name: Learning how to move.
description:
It's easy to move around this mud. Just type &RW&n(West), &RE&n(East),
&RN&n(North), &RS&n(South), &RU&n(Up), &RD&n(Down). To see where you can move,
just look at the '&cExits&n' menu, just bellow the description of 
the room. In this room, there are exits to '&Re&n'(east) and '&Rw&n'(west).
If you type '&Rw&n' you will be back to the initial room.
&n
Try it. Type '&Re&n' to continue with your lessons.
